prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbocharger (88mm compressor wheel, 1.45 A/R turbine housing) for the **G1.6T-GDI (Theta II 1.6L Turbo)** engine, paired with a **PTP Turbo Blanket** to maintain optimal thermal efficiency under sustained 35+ psi boost levels, targeting 650+ WHP on E85 fuel with a **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management system for precise ignition and fuel mapping.

Install a **Tomei 87mm billet crankshaft** with **Manley I-beam connecting rods** and **JE 9.5:1 forged pistons** to handle the increased cylinder pressures, complemented by a **K1 Technologies dual-mass flywheel** and **Spec Stage 4+ clutch** for seamless power delivery to the **Aisin 8-speed wet DCT transmission**, reinforced with a **PPG Gearset (3.73 final drive ratio)** for optimized acceleration.

Integrate a **PWR Australia 4-row front-mount intercooler** (1200hp capacity) with **VRSF 4-inch titanium charge pipes** and **TurboSmart Race Port 50mm blow-off valve**, alongside a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can system** to mitigate oil vapor ingestion under high-load conditions, while upgrading the **Bosch 044 fuel pump** to a **Walbro 525LPH E85-compatible pump** with **ID1700x injectors** for precise fueling.
estetica: Apply a **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (RN22E-specific carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with **custom 3D-printed ABS undertray** for improved aerodynamics, paired with a **Seibon carbon fiber hood** featuring a **functional NACA duct** to direct airflow to the intercooler and brake cooling ducts.

Install **Ohlins TTX46 coilovers** with **Eibach ERS springs (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear)** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** for chassis rigidity, complemented by **BBS LM-R II 19x10.5 ET+15 (front) and 19x12 ET+20 (rear) wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear)** for maximum grip.

Enhance the exterior with a **PPG 'Liquid Silver' custom paint job** (matte finish with **3M Scotchlite reflective pinstriping**), **VLED Angel Eyes (6000K) headlight retrofit**, and **custom 3D-printed carbon fiber side skirts** featuring **integrated LED turn signals**, while the interior receives **Recaro SPG XL seats (HANS-compatible)** with **Alcantara and carbon fiber trim**, a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel**, and a **Motec C127 dash display** for real-time telemetry.
